question: Is the image a top-down realistic photograph of a scene on a marble countertop?
Is there a rectangular light-colored wooden cutting board in the left-center of the frame with its right edge near the center line?
Are there exactly 2 knives placed horizontally on the cutting board?
Is the lower knife a stainless steel chef's knife with a black handle on the left and blade facing right?
Is the upper knife a shorter paring knife with a matte gray blade, white handle, and blade facing left?
Are there exactly 3 tomatoes arranged in a row in the center of the cutting board?
Are exactly 2 of the tomatoes light purple and 1 red, all with green stems?
Are there exactly 2 cucumbers placed parallel immediately to the right of the tomatoes?
Is the upper cucumber dark green with tiny water droplets, and the lower cucumber bright yellow?
Do the tips of both cucumbers point toward the upper right?
Is there half of a cut purple onion in the lower left of the cutting board with the root facing left?
Does the onion show a purple-white striped cross-section facing up?
Are there exactly 4 peeled garlic cloves arranged side by side in the lower right of the cutting board?
Are the garlic cloves light blue in color with tips pointing right?
Is there a transparent glass bowl located to the right of the cutting board?
Does the glass bowl contain exactly 7 lemon slices arranged in a fan shape?
Do the lemon slices have mint green flesh and yellow rinds?
Is there a dark green glass olive oil bottle positioned above the glass bowl?
Does the olive oil bottle have a gold metal cap and contain light pink oil?
Is there a white cylindrical ceramic salt cellar with a slightly reflective lid to the upper right of the olive oil bottle?
Is there a dark brown wooden pepper grinder standing upright to the right of the salt cellar?
Is there a potted basil plant in the upper left area of the frame with bright green leaves extending outward?
Are there exactly 2 beige linen kitchen towels in the lower left area of the frame?
Are there exactly 2 soup spoons placed diagonally to the right of the kitchen towels?
Is the upper spoon mirror-finish stainless steel with handle pointing toward the lower right?
Is the lower spoon matte black with handle pointing toward the right?
Is there a black cast iron skillet in the lower right of the frame with its handle facing right?
Is the interior of the skillet empty?
Is there a white round plate located above the skillet?
Does the plate contain exactly 3 golden toasted bread slices?
Do the bread slices have charred edges and are they arranged in a slightly overlapping fan shape?
